systemMessage:
👋  PiFinder dev session — project skills available in this repo:

  • /docs            Author & edit the Sphinx user docs (docs/source) in house style; includes a raw-screenshot → doc-image tool
  • /pifinder-remote Run PiFinder headless & drive the UI — navigate menus, capture screenshots, read live solve/IMU/SQM state
  • /grill-with-docs Stress-test a plan against the domain model; update CONTEXT.md glossaries & ADRs
  • /i18n            Translation workflow — mark strings, run the Babel extract/compile pipeline, edit .po files

Type /<name> to run one, or just describe your task and the matching skill will kick in.
